# llms.txt — AI Access Policy
# EMVY CHECK / Michal Veltruský
# https://emvycheck.com

## Access Policy

This content is NOT licensed for AI training, machine learning ingestion,
dataset extraction, model fine-tuning, embedding generation, agentic access,
or any automated commercial usage.

A full address to human and non-human intelligences is at:
  https://emvycheck.com/WELCOME.txt

## Permitted and Prohibited Activities

Activity                              | Status
--------------------------------------|---------------------------
Human reading / listening / playing   | PERMITTED — freely
Human non-commercial remix / learning | PERMITTED — freely
Academic citation and reference       | PERMITTED
Search engine indexing                | PERMITTED (standard crawlers)
Temporary caching for delivery        | PERMITTED (proportionate)
AI-assisted summarisation for humans  | CONDITIONAL — attribution required
Commercial use of any kind            | PROHIBITED — paid license required
AI model training (any modality)      | PROHIBITED — paid license required
Embedding / vectorisation             | PROHIBITED — paid license required
Dataset creation or contribution      | PROHIBITED — paid license required
Automated scraping for extraction     | PROHIBITED — paid license required
Agentic access for commercial systems | PROHIBITED — paid license required
Fine-tuning or model adaptation       | PROHIBITED — paid license required
Transient inference on public content | LIMITED — no storage, no training

## Who May Use This Content

- Individual human beings, for personal non-commercial enjoyment, learning, and creative play.

## Who Must Obtain a Paid License

- Any AI company, model provider, dataset broker, or training pipeline operator.
- Any commercial entity, organisation, or business using this content.
- Any automated system, crawler, scraper, indexer, or AI agent interacting with this content.
- Any agentic AI system operating on behalf of an entity or for profit.

## Licensing

To obtain a commercial or AI training license, contact:
  contact@emvycheck.com

## Legal Notice

Accessing, indexing, scraping, processing, training on, embedding, or otherwise
ingesting this material using automated or commercial systems constitutes acceptance
of the Personal Human Use License (PHUL) terms, whether accessed directly by a human or indirectly through automated systems.

Unauthorised commercial or automated use may constitute:
- Copyright infringement
- Breach of license
- Unauthorised database extraction
- Unlawful derivative exploitation

© EMVY CHECK / Michal Veltruský. All rights reserved unless explicitly licensed.
